arśasāna 1〉 adj. zu schaden suchend, boshaft: nyarśasānamoṣati  ṚV. 1,130,8 . 8,12,9 . ava priyamarśasānasya sāhvāṃ chiro bharaddāsasya 2,20,6 . ā sāviṣadarśasānāya śarum 10,99,7 . Entweder von arś oder 2. arṣ.
— 2〉 m. Feuer  Uṇ. 2,85 .
